verses.text: “Leilu lam gamgi pen, Mediterranean Tuipi panin kipanin Hethlon khuapi-ah, Hamath khua lutna-ah, tua panin Damaskas leh Hamath gamgi kituahna sana om Hazarenan khuapi ciang sun ding hi. Minam khat in leitang khen khat ciat ngah ding uh a, a kikal uh gamgite pen gambup nisuahna gamgi panin gambup nitumna gamgi ciang hi ding a, leilu lam panin a hawm uh kipan suk ding uh hi. Leilu lam a khungnung penah Dan minamte
a zomah Asher Minamte
a zomah Naftali Minamte
a zomah Manasseh Minamte
a zomah Efraim Minamte
a zomah Reuben Minamte
a zomah Judah Minamte hi ding hi

“Tuate zomah Pasian-a' dingin a kipia leitang hi ding a, a zaina pen leilu lam panin a kipan leitaw lam tai sawm hi ding hi. A dunglam pen gambup nisuahna gamgi panin gambup nitumna gamgi dong, minam dangte' ngahzah tan mah hi ding a, a laizang sanah biakinn om ding hi
Topa-a' dingin a kipia leitang a sauna tai sawm hi ding a, a zaina tai giat hi ding hi

Siampite in hih a siangtho leitang sung panin tanh ngah ding uh a, leilu lampang leh leitaw lampang tai sawm tuak hi-in, nisuahna lam leh nitumna lampang tai li tuak hi ding hi. Siampite' ngahna sung hih leitang laizangah Topa' biakinn om ding hi

Hih munteng pen Zadok' suanlekhak siampite-a' ding ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel midangte a gamtat khialh uh ciangin Levi midangte bangin va zuilo uh a, hih mite in citakin keima na hong sem uh hi
Tua ahih manin Levi midangte zomah hih bangin a mun tuam diak khat nei ding uh a, tua mun a siangtho pen mun khat hi ding hi
Hih siampite' zomah Levi mite in leitang ngah ding uh a, a sauna tai sawm hi-in, a zaina tai li hi ding hi

Topa tungah a kipia hih leitang siangtho pen, leitang khempeuh panin a hoihpen mun hi a, hih leitang sung panin mun khat peuhpeuh, kizuak theilo, adang tawh zong kikhek theilo, midang tungah zong kipia theilo ding hi. Hih leitang pen a siangtho leitang hi a, Topa-a' ahi hi

“A omlai leitang, a sauna tai sawm leh a zaina tai nih pen a siangtho leitang hiloin a mawkmawk leitang hi ding a, mite' taang zat ding mun hi ding hi. Ten'na ding leh a mun awngthawl hi ding a, a laizangah khuapi om ding hi
A khuapi golna a dung a vai-in a kikim hi ding a, a pang li-in pang khat ciangin pi tul sagih zanga sawmguk hi ding hi
Khuapi kimkot paisuakah pi zali sawmnih paisuak a zai mun awng om ding hi
Khuapi a kilam khit ciangin a siangtho leitang lamah a awng lai, nisuahna lam tai li, nitumna lam tai li a omlaiteng pen khuapi sungah a teng mite in a khawh ding leitang hi ding hi
Khuapi sungah nasemin a om mi peuhmah in Israel minam sung panin kuamah kideidanna omloin hih leitang kho thei ding uh hi
Hih a kisehkhia leitang buppi pen a pang li-in tai sawm pai hi ding a, hih pen leitang siangtho leh khuapihuam sung kigawm hi ding hi

“A pang li-in tai sawm paisuak a pha, Topa-a' dingin a kipia leitang leh khuapi huamteng a kilakkhiat khit ciangin, a pang tuakah a omlai leitang, nitumna lamah tuipi dong, nisuahna lamah gambup gamgi dong, gam uk uliante-a' ding hi ding hi. Hih leitang a kipia kikal sungah, biakinn, Topa' tungah a kipia leitang, Levi mite a kipia leitang, leh khuapihuam leitangte om ding a, gam uk uliante' leitang in hihte laitaak ding hi. Hih gam uk uliante' leitang pen leilu lamah Judah Minamte-a' leh leitaw lamah Benjamin Minamte-a' kikalah om ding hi

“Hih leitang panin leitaw lampang-ah, Israel minam a omlaite in leitang ngah ding uh a, a kikal uh gamgite pen gambup nisuahna gamgi panin gambup nitumna gamgi ciang hi ding a, leilu lam panin a hawm uh kipan suk ding uh hi. Leilu lam a khungnung penah a ngah ding Benjamin Minamte
a zomah Simeon Minamte
a zomah Issakhar Minamte
a zomah Zebulun Minamte
a zomah Gad Minamte hi ding hi

“Leitaw lam panin Gad Minamte a kipia leitang banah gambup gamgi om ding a, Tamar khuapi panin kipanin Meribathkadesh bual nawk ding a, tua panin sak nitumna lam manawhin Egypt-te' gamgi zui ding a, Mediterranean Tuipi-ah tawp ding hi
Tu-a ka gen bangin Israel minamte in a khang a khangin a luah suksuk ding uh leitang dingin amaute tungah a kipia ding leitang ahi hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi.

“A khuapi sungah lutna ding kulhkongpite om hi. A khuapikulh pang lite, pang khat ciangin pi tul sagih zanga sawmguk sau hi. A pang khatah kulhkongpi thum ciat om a, Israel minamte khat ciat tam hi. Leilu lampanga om kulhkongpi thumte in Reuben, Judah, leh Levi tam hi. Nisuahna lampanga omte in Josef, Benjamin, leh Dan tam hi. Leitaw lampanga omte in Simeon, Issakhar, leh Zebulun tam hi. Nitumna lampanga omte in Gad, Asher, leh Naftali tam uh hi
Khuapi kimkot a sauna pi tul sawmthum zanih sawmli pha a, tu-a kipanin hih khuapi min pen, ‘Hih lai-ah Topa om hi,’ kici ding hi,” hong ci hi.
